name: Painel Checking - Nodes 2a Fase (importar e ligar ao Switch)

parameters.sqlQuery:
MERGE `checking-grupoom.form_checking.pi_responsaveis` T
USING (SELECT '{{ $json.body.n_pi }}' AS n_pi, '{{ $json.body.mes_referencia }}' AS mes_referencia) S
ON T.n_pi = S.n_pi AND T.mes_referencia = S.mes_referencia
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
  responsavel = '{{ $json.body.responsavel }}',
  responsavel_nome = '{{ $json.body.responsavel_nome || "" }}',
  conta = '{{ $json.body.conta || "" }}',
  atribuido_por = '{{ $json.authenticatedUser?.email || "sistema" }}',
  atribuido_em = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT
  (n_pi, responsavel, responsavel_nome, mes_referencia, conta, atribuido_por, atribuido_em)
VALUES
  ('{{ $json.body.n_pi }}', '{{ $json.body.responsavel }}', '{{ $json.body.responsavel_nome || "" }}', '{{ $json.body.mes_referencia }}', '{{ $json.body.conta || "" }}', '{{ $json.authenticatedUser?.email || "sistema" }}', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT n_pi, responsavel, responsavel_nome, conta, mes_referencia,
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', atribuido_em) AS atribuido_em
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.pi_responsaveis`
WHERE ('{{ $json.body.mes_referencia || "" }}' = '' OR mes_referencia = '{{ $json.body.mes_referencia }}')
ORDER BY conta, n_pi

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
INSERT INTO `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_comments`
(id, submission_id, n_pi, comentario, tipo, autor, autor_nome, created_at)
VALUES (
  GENERATE_UUID(),
  '{{ $json.body.submission_id }}',
  '{{ $json.body.n_pi || "" }}',
  '''{{ ($json.body.comentario || "").replace(/'/g, "") }}''',
  '{{ $json.body.tipo || "nota" }}',
  '{{ $json.authenticatedUser?.email || $json.body.autor || "sistema" }}',
  '{{ $json.authenticatedUser?.name || "" }}',
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
)

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT id, comentario, tipo, autor, autor_nome,
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', created_at) AS created_at
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_comments`
WHERE submission_id = '{{ $json.body.submission_id }}'
ORDER BY created_at DESC

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
MERGE `checking-grupoom.form_checking.suppliers` T
USING (SELECT '{{ $json.body.veiculo }}' AS veiculo) S
ON T.veiculo = S.veiculo
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET rating = {{ Number($json.body.rating) || 0 }}, updated_by = '{{ $json.authenticatedUser?.email || "" }}', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (veiculo, rating, updated_by, updated_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.body.veiculo }}', {{ Number($json.body.rating) || 0 }}, '{{ $json.authenticatedUser?.email || "" }}', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery: SELECT veiculo, rating, observacao FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.suppliers` ORDER BY rating DESC, veiculo

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
UPDATE `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
SET status = '{{ $json.body.status }}',
    approval_user = '{{ $json.body.approval_user || $json.authenticatedUser?.email || "" }}',
    approved_at = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.body.status }}' = 'approved' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() ELSE approved_at END,
    rejected_at = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.body.status }}' = 'rejected' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() ELSE rejected_at END
WHERE submission_id = '{{ $json.body.id }}'

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
MERGE `checking-grupoom.form_checking.sla_config` T
USING (SELECT 'global' AS id) S ON T.id = S.id
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET horas_atencao = {{ Number($json.body.horas_atencao) || 5 }}, horas_risco = {{ Number($json.body.horas_risco) || 12 }}, updated_by = '{{ $json.authenticatedUser?.email || "" }}', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (id, horas_atencao, horas_risco) VALUES ('global', {{ Number($json.body.horas_atencao) || 5 }}, {{ Number($json.body.horas_risco) || 12 }})

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery: SELECT horas_atencao, horas_risco FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.sla_config` WHERE id = 'global' LIMIT 1

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario
